text: ¥ CLAUDE.md i #% Standard Workflow P 1. First think through the problem, read the codebase for relevant files, and write a plan to projectplan.md 3 2. The plan should have a list of todo items that you can check off as you complete them 4 3. Before you begin working, check in with me and I will verify the plan b 4. Then, begin working on the todo items, marking them as complete as you go 3 5. Please every step of the way just give me a high level explanation of what [ E Y IV BT [ 7/ 6. Make every task and code change you do as simple as possible. We want to avoid LELS IV RET AL E T AV g elo], T (- T e T S VTT VAN E Ty T TSI T ITA K RS T T E T S TR 6§ o f CR e 1 [ as possible. Everything is about simplicity 8 7. Finally, add a review section to the projectplan.md file with a summary of the changes you made and any other relevant information
